Identity.Name: StingIssueStates
Identity.Definition: Issue lifecycle states — the state machine an issue passes through from raised to closed. Drives Planscape BimIssue.State, BCF 2.1 topic status, mobile inbox filtering, and SLA breach detection. Voided and Reopened are terminal-state exceptions for audit retention.

Governance.StandardsBasis: BCF 2.1 topic status; STING BimIssue state machine

Value.Definition: Open — newly raised, awaiting first response. Default state on creation.
In Review — acknowledged by assignee, under active investigation.
Reviewed — investigation complete, awaiting formal response.
Responded — formal response issued. Awaiting raiser's confirmation that it satisfies the query.
Resolved — raiser has accepted the response. Close to closed.
Voided — raised in error / duplicate / out-of-scope. Retained for audit, excluded from SLA.
Reopened — closed issue re-activated. Carries link to the original close event in audit log.
